name: Razorpay Billing
description: Payments, orders, subscriptions, payouts via Razorpay's official MCP

env_vars.description: Razorpay OAuth Access Token or Key ID
env_vars.how_to_set: Razorpay's MCP endpoint may require an OAuth token. If API keys don't work, create an OAuth application at dashboard.razorpay.com/app/website-app-settings/api-keys. See: razorpay.com/docs/payments/server-integration/oauth
dashboard.razorpay.com → Settings → API Keys → same as Key ID generation

tools.name: create_payment_link
tools.description: Create a Razorpay payment link with a specified amount, currency, and customer details to share with buyers

amount.description: Payment amount in paise (smallest currency unit, e.g. 5000 = ₹50)

description.description: Description of what the payment is for

customer_name.description: Name of the customer receiving the payment link

expire_by.description: Unix timestamp after which the link expires

tools.name: get_payment
tools.description: Retrieve details of a specific Razorpay payment by its payment ID including status and method

tools.name: list_payments
tools.description: List Razorpay payments with optional filters for date range, count, and pagination

from.description: Start Unix timestamp for filtering payments

to.description: End Unix timestamp for filtering payments

skip.description: Number of payments to skip for pagination

tools.name: create_order
tools.description: Create a Razorpay order that is required before initiating a payment through the Razorpay checkout

receipt.description: Your internal receipt or order reference ID

notes.description: Key-value pairs of additional notes to attach to the order

tools.name: fetch_order
tools.description: Fetch details of an existing Razorpay order by ID, including its status and associated payments
